nodes.title: Add test for `exclude-newer-package` with missing `timestamp` in the lockfile
Ensure uv invocations of git do not inherit repository location environment variables
Support `uv lock` on a `pyproject.toml` that only contains dependency-groups
Respect discovered hashes from lookahead build dependencies
Run `LookaheadResolver` when resolving PEP 517 build requirements
Move retry logic into its own file
Update Rust crate indexmap to v2.14.0
Update Rust crate fastrand to v2.4.1
Update Rust crate tokio to v1.51.1
Update Rust crate rustls to v0.23.38
Refactor `update_availability_range` to use iterator and collect
Use an Ubuntu snapshot for apt installs in CI for reproducibility
Add a lock equality assertion for `uv lock --check` with a relative exclude newer
Update Rust crate webpki to v0.103.12
Allow `exclude-newer` to be missing from the lockfile when `exclude-newer-span` is present
Use a no-op timestamp for `exclude-newer` in lockfiles when a relative value is configured
Add test case for lock when `exclude-newer` is missing but `exclude-newer-span` is present
Only show the version number in `uv self version --short`
Pin prettier in `scripts/generate-crate-readmes.py` to avoid prompts
Fix Python variant tagging in the Windows registry
Skip Pyodide pre-release builds during version sync
replace the RAYON_INITIALIZE `LazyLock` with a local `Once`
Allow some modification of global preview state
Update Rust crate similar to v3
Update Rust crate tokio to v1.51.0
Update Rust crate hyper to v1.9.0
Update Rust crate insta to v1.47.2
Update Rust crate indexmap to v2.13.1
Update cgr.dev/chainguard/python:latest-dev Docker digest to c2ac411
Emit JSON report for `uv sync --check` failures
Fix equality comparisons for version specifiers with `~=` operators
Avoid installing tool workspace member dependencies as editable
Catch missing uv build backend compatible version bumps
Pin the platform during reproducible trampoline builds
Discover versioned Python executables when `requires-python` pins a version
Fetch uv from Astral mirror during self-update
Trim trailing whitespace in help output
